title: Faded Build: Create a Bounded Responsive Survey Shell
summary: Faded Build: Create a Bounded Responsive Survey Shell retrieves prior skills in an original partially specified multi-viewport survey sizing sprint scenario and requires implementation, behavior, failure-state, and transfer evidence.
objectives: Apply css absolute units, css font relative units, css percentage units, css viewport dynamic units, css math fluid sizing in unfamiliar constraints.
Produce or audit a real partially specified multi-viewport survey sizing sprint artifact without happy-path-only reasoning.
Preserve earlier requirements while testing keyboard, narrow-width, invalid, and assistive-semantic states.

starterFiles.html: <!-- Continue the Community Needs Survey sizing work here. -->
starterFiles.css: /* Continue the bounded responsive sizing system here. */
